# mediaFolderLocation

**Instance Property**

The location of the iTunes music folder.

## Declaration

```swift
var mediaFolderLocation: URL? { get }
```

## Getting iTunes Library Info

- **allMediaItems**: All the media items (tracks) in the iTunes library.
- **allPlaylists**: All the playlists in the iTunes library.
- **apiMajorVersion**: The major version number of the API the iTunesLibrary framework exposes.
- **apiMinorVersion**: The minor version number of the API the iTunesLibrary framework exposes.
- **applicationVersion**: The version of iTunes that created or modified the iTunes library you’re accessing.
- **shouldShowContentRating**: A Boolean value indicating whether to show content rating labels.
